name: ESSEXPOWERLINES.CA
message: [AI generated] Essex Powerlines is a Canadian electricity distribution company based in Essex County, Ontario. It serves approximately 30,000 customers across four different municipalities: LaSalle, Leamington, Tecumseh, and Amherstburg. The company is committed to providing reliable and safe energy solutions. Essex Powerlines also plays a significant role in promoting green energy initiatives, offering energy conservation programs to help customers achieve energy efficiency.
